query:
SELECT 
  c.id as client_id, 
  c.name as client_name, 
  c.userId,
  u.name as user_name,
  u.email,
  q.id as quotation_id,
  q.quotationNumber,
  q.status
FROM clients c
LEFT JOIN users u ON c.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN quotations q ON q.clientId = c.id
WHERE q.status = 'sent'
ORDER BY c.id;
